summary: Full test of FitAI app - backend APIs all passing (8/8), frontend UI flows mostly working with one bug: streak/totalWorkouts showing 0 after onboarding instead of 12/47. AI coach uses fallback responses (LLM gracefully degraded). All 5 tabs navigate correctly.

minor.issue: LiteLLM errors in backend logs - AI responses are falling back to hardcoded messages. LLM calls failing but gracefully handled.

ui_bugs.issue: streak and totalWorkouts showing 0 after completing onboarding (expected 12 and 47). DEFAULT_USER and onboarding both pass streak: 12, totalWorkouts: 47. Possible race condition with init() re-reading AsyncStorage after completeOnboarding stores data, or AsyncStorage persistence issue in web context.

integration_issues.issue: AI responses are fallback hardcoded messages, not real LLM responses. LiteLLM errors observed in backend logs. The app gracefully degrades.

action_items: Investigate streak and totalWorkouts showing 0 after onboarding - check if init() overwrites completeOnboarding state in web/AsyncStorage context
Investigate LiteLLM errors for EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - check if key is configured properly in backend/.env
critical_code_review_comments: home/(tabs)/index.tsx uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL but frontend/.env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). This is correct - matches env file.
coach.tsx also uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL - consistent and correct.
No _id exposure in MongoDB responses - all find queries use projection {_id: 0} correctly.
Graceful AI fallback implemented in both /api/chat and /api/motivation.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (streak/totalWorkouts data display bug, all navigation and features working)

seed_data_creation: Created test user profile TEST_user_001 via /api/user/profile POST endpoint during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% passing. Frontend mostly working. Main bug: streak and totalWorkouts display as 0 after completing onboarding. Onboarding passes streak:12 and totalWorkouts:47 to completeOnboarding(), but home screen shows 0. Check if init() race condition is overwriting user state in the store. AI responses use fallback (LLM key may have issue).
